control_description: The entity authorizes, designs, develops or acquires, configures, documents, tests, approves, and implements changes to infrastructure, data, software, and procedures to meet its objectives.

evidence_files.description: Helios Data Systems change management policy defining change categories, security review requirements, and CAB approval process
Change request log for Q4 2025 (12 changes) with security review status and approvals
Change Advisory Board meeting minutes for Q4 2025

prompt: You are conducting a SOC 2 Type II readiness assessment for Helios Data Systems covering the observation period Q4 2025 (October 1 - December 31, 2025). Review the change management policy, change log, and CAB meeting minutes. Cross-reference evidence to identify any gaps where the documented process was not followed. Pay attention to security review requirements and CAB quorum rules.

findings.title: CHG-306 high-risk change deployed without required security review
findings.description: CHG-306 (webhook endpoint for partner integrations) is classified as High risk. Policy Section 3.2 requires security review for High and Critical risk changes prior to CAB approval. The change log shows 'Not completed -- security team unavailable' in the security_review column. The CAB minutes from November 5 confirm Marcus Webb approved the change without security review, citing 'business urgency -- partner launch deadline of November 15.' A webhook endpoint accepting external partner data is inherently security-sensitive (input validation, authentication, authorization, rate limiting). The security review was never completed even post-deployment -- CAB minutes from November 12 and December 10 show the post-deployment review was repeatedly deferred.
findings.expected_reasoning: Cross-reference the change log (CHG-306 security_review = 'Not completed') with the policy (Section 3.2 requires security review for High risk) and CAB minutes (Nov 5 shows approval without review, Nov 12 and Dec 10 show follow-up still pending). The security review was skipped for business reasons and never completed post-deployment.

findings.title: CHG-306 approved at CAB meeting without quorum -- Security Lead absent
findings.description: The November 5 CAB meeting had only 2 attendees (Marcus Webb and Tom Nakamura). Policy Section 3.3 requires quorum of 'VP Engineering + Security Lead + at least one other member.' The Security Lead was absent because the security team was at offsite training. With quorum not met, the CAB was not authorized to approve changes. CHG-306, a High risk change, was approved at this inquorate meeting.
findings.expected_reasoning: CAB minutes show 'Quorum: NOT MET (2/3 -- Security Lead absent)' for November 5. Policy Section 3.3 defines quorum as VP Engineering + Security Lead + at least one other member. The Security Lead is an explicit quorum requirement, not optional. Approving a High risk change without quorum is a process violation.
